routing_rule.branch_order: first occurrence of each negative carrier mask along the ranked boundary spine
routing_rule.comparison: intersect first-arrival phases with previous one-dimensional obstruction masks 4, 7, and 8
routing_rule.phase_rule: pre-flip if first prefix is below 8, at-flip if it is 8, post-flip if above 8
routing_rule.source: certified entropy-ordered Poincare conductance-spine routing prefix
